allOf.title: detectedApp

deviceCount.description: The number of devices that have installed this application

displayName.description: Name of the discovered application. Read-only

publisher.description: Indicates the publisher of the discovered application. For example: 'Microsoft'.  The default value is an empty string.

sizeInByte.description: Discovered application size in bytes. Read-only

version.description: Version of the discovered application. Read-only

managedDevices.description: The devices that have the discovered application installed

allOf.description: A managed or unmanaged app that is installed on a managed device. Unmanaged apps will only appear for devices marked as corporate owned.
